heading: Parent partnerships with child development centers
label: 2925 Parent partnerships with child development centers
notes: Amendments2022—Subsec. (a)(3). substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “FACA” in heading and “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in text.Pub. L. 117–2862018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 555 of this title
amendments: Amendments2022—Subsec. (a)(3). substituted “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “FACA” in heading and “Chapter 10 of title 5” for “The Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. App.)” in text.Pub. L. 117–2862018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 555 of this title

children.heading: .—Formation
children.label: 1 .—Formation
children.text: The Commandant shall require that there be formed at each Coast Guard child development center a board of parents, to be composed of parents of children attending the center.

children.label: A
children.text: meet periodically with the staff of the center at which the board is formed and the commander of the unit served by the center, for the purpose of discussing problems and concerns; and

children.label: B
children.text: be responsible, together with the staff of the center, for coordinating any parent participation initiative established under subsection (b).

children.heading: 105.—Chapterof title
children.label: 3 105.—Chapterof title
children.text: Chapter 10 of title 5 does not apply to a board of parents formed under paragraph (1).

children.heading: .—Parent Participation Initiative
children.label: b .—Parent Participation Initiative
children.text: The Commandant is authorized to establish a parent participation initiative at each Coast Guard child development center to encourage and facilitate parent participation in educational and related activities at the center.
